author: Yishen Tu
description: Embeds Claude Code/Codex as an AI collaborator in your vault. Your vault becomes agent's working directory, giving it full agentic capabilities: file read/write, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Yishen Tu
manifest.description: Embeds Claude Code, Codex, and other coding agents as AI collaborators in your vault. Your vault becomes their working directory, giving them capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.
manifest.name: Claudian

name: Claudian
